prestazioni: Turbocharged 2.5L Skyactiv-G PY-VPS engine (Mazda's 88kW/L high-compression NA base) upgraded with a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) on a custom Precision Turbo & Engine manifold, supporting 350whp on E85 with a Cobb Accessport v3 Stage 2+ tune (targeting 22psi peak boost, 2800rpm spool, and 7,200rpm redline).

Full Mazdaspeed 6-derived drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco 1.5-way LSD (28-spline, 2.5L-specific), PTT 3.5-inch aluminum driveshaft, and South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily (organic/ceramic hybrid, 600ft-lb torque capacity) paired with a Fidanza 13lb aluminum flywheel for the 6-speed Skyactiv-MT transmission.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Mazda 6 GJ/GL-specific valving, 24-way rebound/18-way compression damping) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs, Whiteline 27mm front/24mm rear adjustable sway bars (GJ-specific end links), and SuperPro 80-durometer polyurethane bushings (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion (GJ/GL-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (1.5mm pre-preg, autoclave-cured) and a Rocket Bunny V2 rear diffuser (polyurethane, 3-piece bolt-on for GJ sedan).

Seibon Carbon fiber hood (GJ-specific, 30% weight reduction, dual NACA ducts for intercooler airflow) and trunk lid (with integrated duckbill spoiler, 50mm rise, 3M 1080 vinyl overlay in 'Mazda Soul Red Crystal' for UV protection).

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear, 5x114.3, 20mm spacers) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear) with Brembo GT 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors, GJ-specific brackets) and Project Mu 999.9 compound brake pads.
